steps.title: Identify the series structure
steps.content: The passage lists three parallel items introduced by “established”: the sanctity of animal [life], the just treatment of the elderly, and the abolition of the slave trade. These form a series that requires proper punctuation boundaries.

steps.title: Apply the series rule
steps.content: D) uses a comma to mark the boundary between items in a series, which is the correct punctuation. A), B), and C) violate the series rule by omitting punctuation, misusing a semicolon, or misusing a colon. That confirms D is correct.
